role_summary: the concurrent auditor performs real -time audits, primarily in banks and financial  institutions, to en sure ongoing compliance and accuracy.
responsibilities: • review daily transactions and banking operations   • ensure adherence to rbi and internal guidelines   • detect irregularities and fraud risks   • report exceptions on a timely basis   • support regulatory inspec tions and audits   • maintain detailed audit documentation
qualifications: • qualified ca   • knowledge of banking operations and rbi norms   • high attention to detail   • strong reporting and observation skills
